strategy.name: Pullback-to-20-EMA in a Confirmed Uptrend (scaled from $1000 Learning Plan)
sources: Crypto Synthesis v1 Pine reference (daily chart)
Qullamaggie power-trend + Credible Crypto HTF bias
strategy.description: Only buy dips inside an established uptrend. The 1H trend must already be up (close above 50 EMA AND 20 EMA > 50 EMA). Execute only when price pulls back to the 20 EMA on the 4H and volume confirms. Single setup. No counter-trend trades. No shorts. PAPER account inflated to $5,000 USD so the user can see how position sizing scales — real capital is only $73 USD (~100 CAD).
strategy.paper_mode_only_until: 100 paper trades logged with <10% rule violations

indicators.ema_20: Fast trend / pullback target. Entries happen when price taps or closes into the 20 EMA inside an uptrend.
indicators.ema_50: Slow trend filter. Price MUST be above the 50 EMA on the 4H for any long.
indicators.volume_20_avg: Confirmation. Entry bar volume must be >= 1.2x the 20-bar average. No trade on anaemic volume.
indicators.atr_14: Used to size the stop. Stop distance = 1x ATR(14) below the swing low of the pullback.

bullish: Price is above the 50 EMA on the 4H
The 20 EMA is above the 50 EMA on the 4H (stacked trend)
bearish: Price is below the 50 EMA on the 4H
The 20 EMA is below the 50 EMA on the 4H
bias_criteria.no_trade_zone: When price is between the 20 and 50 EMA and they are flat — choppy range, stand aside.

long: Price is above the 50 EMA on the 4H — uptrend confirmed
The 20 EMA is above the 50 EMA on the 4H — trend is stacked
Price has pulled back to within 5% of the 20 EMA (widened threshold for more signals)
The most recent 4H candle closed bullish (close > open) — reclaim after the pullback
Entry-bar volume is at least 1.2x the 20-bar average volume
Price is NOT more than 3% extended above the 50 EMA — not buying a climax
No major news event (CPI/FOMC/NFP/major earnings) within the next 2 hours
short: DISABLED — this account does not short. Spot only. No shorts until the scaling plan clears phase 2.

exit_rules: Hard stop: 3.5% below entry price. Submitted WITH the entry, never adjusted further away.
First target: 2R (2x the stop distance). Close 50% of the position at 2R and move the stop to breakeven.
Runner target: 3R OR a 4H close below the 20 EMA, whichever comes first.
Time stop: if price has not moved at least 0.8x ATR in favour within 5 x 4H bars, exit at the next close.
Full exit on RSI(14) > 80 on the 4H — treat overbought as a gift, take the profit.
risk_rules: Risk maximum 1.5% of portfolio per trade. On the $5,000 paper account that is $75 per trade.
Maximum trade size capped by MAX_TRADE_SIZE_USD in .env ($5,000 — full portfolio). Bot hard-stops above this.
Maximum trades per day capped by MAX_TRADES_PER_DAY in .env (5). Bot stops itself after 5.
Daily loss limit: 3% of account = $150 on paper. If hit, close positions and stop trading for the day.
Weekly loss limit: 7.5% of account = $375 on paper. If hit, stop trading for the week and review every trade.
ZERO leverage. Spot only. No margin, no perps, no futures. Non-negotiable for 12 months.
Position sizing formula: size_usd = risk_per_trade_usd / stop_distance_pct. Then cap by MAX_TRADE_SIZE_USD.
Minimum expected move: 0.8% from entry to first target. Otherwise fees eat the trade.
Skip the trade if BTC perp funding rate > 0.05%/8h (crowded longs).
Paper-trade FIRST. Only flip PAPER_TRADING=false after 100 logged paper trades with < 10% rule violations.
forbidden: Moving a stop further away after entry
Adding to a losing position (averaging down)
Trading during red-flag news (CPI / FOMC / NFP / major earnings within 2h)
Copying trades from Twitter / Discord / YouTube in real time
Using leverage or margin on crypto
Taking a 3rd trade on the same day
Trading any asset not on the watchlist
Changing this rulebook mid-session — edits only happen during the weekly review
notes: Strategy ported from the $1000 Learning Account rulebook and the Crypto Synthesis v1 Pine reference, scaled to a $73 USD (~100 CAD) paper-trading pot. Primary objective is SURVIVAL and mechanical execution, not profit. All entries are long-only, spot-only, single pullback-to-20-EMA setup on the 4H BTC chart. Daily runs via Railway every 4 hours. Expected drawdown of 20-40% is normal — do not abandon the system mid-drawdown.
